instructions: Write your email using all the notes.

task.subject: A class photo
task.initialEmail: Hi,||Our teacher wants to take a class photo for the school website. [1]Do you think Friday morning is a good time?[/1]||[2]Can you remind everyone to wear the school uniform?[/2]||[3]Where should we take the photo?[/3]||[4]Should we ask the teacher if students can see the photo before it goes online?[/4]||See you tomorrow||Zoe

sampleAnswer.text: Hi Zoe,||Thanks for writing. [1]I don’t think Friday morning is a good time because some students have a sports lesson and may be late.[/1]||[2]Yes, I can remind everyone to wear the school uniform. I’ll send a message to our class group tonight.[/2]||[3]We should take the photo in the garden because the light is better outside and the background looks nicer.[/3]||[4]Yes, we should ask the teacher if students can see the photo first, because some people may not like it.[/4]||I can help organise everyone quickly.||See you tomorrow,||Finn
